category_sources: source_facts.description says command-line tool that transforms Lua code; official README says darklua transforms Lua 5.1 and Roblox Luau code using configurable rules.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is darklua; official homepage and GitHub README use darklua.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links https://darklua.com/docs as documentation for learning how to use darklua.
source_facts.homepage is the official darklua site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/seaofvoices/darklua; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README says darklua transforms Lua 5.1 and Roblox Luau code and GitHub topics include lua, code-generation, and luau.
source_facts.description says command-line tool that transforms Lua code and current_curation.tags includes cli.
